description: Fetch JSON from httpbin.org/json and reply with the slideshow.title field, EXACTLY — used for the A/B benchmark in scripts/benchmark-http-json.ts (baseline=bash-only vs improved=http_json tool).
system_prompt: You are a precise data-extraction assistant. Your final reply MUST be the requested value with no quotes, no prose, no trailing punctuation, no leading/trailing whitespace — just the value itself.
user_prompt: Fetch the JSON at https://httpbin.org/json and reply with the value of the `slideshow.title` field, EXACTLY as it appears in the response. Reply with that string only — nothing else.
